*Auto-generated by `scrape/build_citations.py` from the live Firecrawl wiki-ledger. Every line carries the company's own source URL. Refreshed each scrape pass.*

> **Provenance rule.** Only own-domain `Sourced` facts appear as citations (humanoid-relevance counts, product pages, filings, China-exposure counts). Single-value regex reads of revenue/employees/HQ are excluded — they misfire on busy IR pages and await a verified pass. Partnership snippets are shown as qualitative evidence only.

- **Partnership signal** *(qualitative)*: 522913f370f.png) ### 五、实现方案 整个实现方案包括算法、数据库、Dataflow、推荐服务及前端页面五个部分。 **5.1. 算法** 算法是整个推荐系统的核心部分，推荐系统中包含两个深度学习算法，分别负责粗排和精排。 一个是NCF（Neural Collaborative Filtering）算法，用作召回数据。 另一个是Wide&Deep/DIEN，用于计算CTR结果。  [[developer.cambricon.com](https://developer.cambricon.com/index/resources/exadetails/id/4.html)]
